data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly listed in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any confirmation of email notifications being sent to customers after booking. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in the validation of this requirement, as the expected result was to confirm coverage or identify a precise gap.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
